title: Best Savings Account Interest Rates
body:
O.P.
Welcome to the new version of the long-running Best Interest Rates for Savings Accounts thread.
Please read the new wiki, which will appear at the top of all pages. There have been some changes made to reflect more flexibility: a move away from just posting facts about interest rates to promoting discussion, while at the same time suggesting more appropriate places for other topics. As the wiki states clearly, Whirlpool is a discussion forum, and we encourage relevant, respectful and helpful posts.
If you have concerns about the new thread or the wiki change, please discuss these in Talk With a Mod .
